prompt:
Assign GRADE certainty ratings to each evidence item below.
Ratings: HIGH (systematic review of RCTs, low heterogeneity), MODERATE (RCT with some concerns, or consistent observational), LOW (observational studies, high heterogeneity, indirect evidence), VERY_LOW (case reports, expert opinion, serious limitations).

For each item, output ONLY the number and rating, one per line:
1. HIGH
2. MODERATE
...

EVIDENCE:
1. [SILVER] Source: Effect of global damp heat ageing on debonding of crosslinke | Statement: Compressive shear behavior of EVA laminates was not significantly affected by damp heat aging up to 10,000h at 85C/85%RH
2. [SILVER] Source: Effect of global damp heat ageing on debonding of crosslinke | Statement: POE laminates revealed improved compressive shear performance after damp heat aging compared to unaged state
3. [SILVER] Source: Effect of global damp heat ageing on debonding of crosslinke | Statement: POE laminates exhibited failure mode transition from interfacial (unaged) to combined interfacial and cohesive after 10,000h damp heat
4. [SILVER] Source: Effect of global damp heat ageing on debonding of crosslinke | Statement: EVA laminates failed in interfacial manner independent of damp heat aging time throughout 10,000h exposure
5. [SILVER] Source: Effect of global damp heat ageing on debonding of crosslinke | Statement: Carboxylic acid groups were found on interfacially fractured surfaces of both EVA and POE laminates after damp heat aging
